schema_note: Regression suite armed by /harness-summary saturation graduation. Append-only. Each entry is a verbatim copy of a saturated criterion from its producing sprint tasks.json, plus graduated_from_sprint. Consumed by sprint-workflow Step 0.5 (regression gate, exit-0-is-PASS).
graduation_policy: Only criteria whose verification_command has correct exit-code polarity (exit 0 == desired state) are graduated verbatim. Negative-assertion gates (test -d) and boolean-jq-without-e gates are saturation-detected but graduation-blocked pending an exit-code-faithful source fix; see .harness/summary.md Saturation section.

tasks.criterion: Should NOT regress Sprint 6 JIT annotations in harness-kickoff SKILL.md: The six `<!-- Context scope at this step: ... -->` comment blocks added in Sprint 6 must remain intact. Verify: `grep -c '<!-- Context scope at this step:' plugins/trine-eval/skills/harness-kickoff/SKILL.md` assert count >= 6. (Pre-sprint baseline: 6 — Steps 1, 2, 2b, 3, 4, and 5.)
tasks.verification_command: grep -c '<!-- Context scope at this step:' plugins/trine-eval/skills/harness-kickoff/SKILL.md
